title: City of Dallas ACFR FY2024
description: Comprehensive Annual Financial Report — primary source for Dallas debt, pension, OPEB, and other long-term obligations.

title: City of Dallas Debt Service Overview (as of 9/30/2025)
description: Current debt service schedules and outstanding principal.

title: KBRA Credit Report (Nov 2024)
description: Affirms AA+ GO rating. Details $6.46B combined NPL, 2.87% of FMV, $4,959 per capita.

title: S&P Global Credit Report (Feb 2024)
description: Affirms AA-. Calls pension/OPEB a 'significant credit weakness.' Budgetary performance 'weak' after pension contribution deficiencies.

title: Cara Mendelsohn — 'What is the Real Cost of the 2024 Dallas Bond?'
description: Council District 12 analysis: $3.5B total debt, $3.4B DPFP unfunded, $1.2B ERF unfunded = $8.1B+ total.

title: City of Houston HB 1378 Debt Transparency Filing
description: Per capita total $8,515, tax-supported per capita $5,308. Total debt including interest $19.7B.

title: City of Houston Pension Solution Page
description: $8.2B pre-reform unfunded. 2017 reform details including POB issuance and cost corridor.

title: Texas Policy Foundation — 'Just the Facts: Government Debt' (FY2022)
description: All five cities' total debt with principal + interest breakdowns.

title: Truth in Accounting — Financial State of the Cities (FY2023)
description: TIA grades and taxpayer burden for all Texas cities. Published March 2025.

title: Texas Bond Review Board — Debt Affordability Study (Feb 2025)
description: State-level context, local debt per capita rankings.

title: Texas Comptroller — Debt at a Glance
description: Dallas GO debt per capita history and comparison graphs.

title: Texas Tribune — 'Billions in pension shortfalls threatening Texas cities' budgets'
description: Moody's rankings of all four major Texas cities' pension obligations.

title: Texas Monthly — 'Texas's Pension Problems' (Jan 2017)
description: Moody's-adjusted figures: Dallas $7.6B, Houston $10B, Austin $2.7B, SA $2.3B.

title: Bond Buyer — 'Pension obligation bonds may be option for underfunded Dallas pensions' (Sept 2023)
Reason Foundation — Debt Trends for State and Local Governments (2025)
description: National pension debt rankings and trend analysis.

title: Baker Institute — 'Houston's Pension Shortfall' (2016)
description: Detailed CAFR analysis methodology for municipal pension obligations.

title: Fort Worth 2024 Debt Financing Plan
description: Moody's scorecard details, pension notch-down factor.

title: The Texan — 'Texas Among Top in Nation with $12,500 Local Government Debt Per Citizen' (2020)
description: Houston first among Texas localities; $367.4B total local debt statewide.
